subcodes.first_line: We have raised high the heaven of man and adorned it with the twin luminaries of steadfastness and trustworthiness. Verily, He is the Sovereign, ordaining as He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد رفعنا سماء الانسان و زیناها بنیری الاستقامة و الامانة انه لهو الحاکم کیف یشاء
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
